AOI.notes: Italian East Africa replaces the separate Eritrean and Somali colonial administrations in the 1939 setup.

CHI.notes: Hainan and Guangdong baseline moved back under Nationalist Chinese ownership.

ENG.notes: Aden represented as British-controlled enclave in the 1939 setup.

GER.notes: Anschluss: Austria and attached states are merged into Germany by 1939.

GMA.notes: Project extension: Gansu Ma clique split from the coarse XSM block in 1939.

GXC.notes: Guangxi clique owner-layer override for the 1939 scenario.

HUN.notes: Southern Slovak strip from targeted SK ADM2 split features.

ITA.notes: Italian occupation and annexation of Albania by 1939.

MEN.notes: Hebei-Chahar frontline represented as Mengjiang field control over the contested corridor features.

NCP.notes: North China collaboration administration across Beijing, Tianjin, the occupied Hebei core, and Shandong while leaving MAN, MEN, and direct Japanese bridgeheads out.

POL.notes: Zaolzie transfer to Poland before September 1939, approximated with the Karvina district after full CZ ADM2 replacement.

PRC.notes: Communist China remains limited to the northern Shaanbei base area and excludes Xi'an and central Shaanxi in 1939.

QMA.notes: Project extension: Qinghai Ma clique split from the coarse XSM block in 1939.

RGC.notes: Shanghai municipality shifts from direct Japanese controller coloring to the Reformed Government preview layer.

SHX.notes: Shanxi warlord baseline override including the 1939 Suiyuan and Ordos extension.

SIC.notes: Project extension: 1939 Xikang clique owner layer limited to Liu Wenhui's eastern Kham and western Sichuan base without absorbing Chamdo.

SLO.notes: Slovakia appears as a separate axis-aligned puppet state in 1939.

TIB.notes: Tibet owner-layer override for the 1939 scenario.

TUR.notes: Hatay transfer to Turkey shortly before scenario start.

XSM.notes: Ningxia remains under Xibei San Ma and absorbs the far-western Alashan frontier that does not belong to Mengjiang in 1939.

YUN.notes: Yunnan clique owner-layer override for the 1939 scenario.
